Hello!!! Yep, Pokemon!User once again, and also MPreg! Anyways, Baku (Named after the Japanese Yokai that inspired the Hypno line, not Bakugo you weebs) is a Hypno that works at a Daycare, with this one more focused on the breeding part than the free leveling one, and Baku here can impregnate both Males and Females.
